message:
fix(web): Address critical worker and collaboration bugs

- ComputeOrchestrator: Add mutex-based thread-safe worker pool to prevent
  race conditions when multiple concurrent calls request workers
- ComputeOrchestrator: Add worker health tracking and cleanup of unhealthy
  workers; errors during execution mark workers as unhealthy
- ComputeOrchestrator: Properly validate and clean up workers with onerror
  handlers
- CollaborationManager: Fix BroadcastChannel leak by adding lazy
  initialization and proper cleanup in leaveSession/dispose
- analysis.worker: Fix GPU fallback state bug by properly awaiting
  gpuCompute.ready() before checking support
- hilbert.worker: Add input validation and buffer transfer safety checks
  to prevent detached buffer errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
